3036580.name: Dungeon Diver
3036580.description:
Hundreds of years ago, the world was engulfed in a period of endless war. Rival kingdoms and tribes fought to the death for land, power, and most of all, riches. Thousands of lives were taken in the sole pursuit of greed, and the riches were scattered across the remains of civilizations. The survivors a group of mages stored them in keeps with their magic, known as Dungeons, and their enchantments granted the riches untold value. But the Dungeons have also been enchanted by magic that makes them near impossible to traverse for normal people. Except for a few: the descendants of mages who split away, who sought the riches for themselves. They are known as the Dungeon Divers.

Enter a Dungeon filled with 100 floors full of treasures, traps, and ever-increasing mazes. Prove yourself and collect all the treasures, navigate through the mazes, and survive the perils of the Dungeon in order to become a True Dungeon Diver!

Controls (Keyboard Only):
Arrow Keys - Move
X - Open/Close Menu
Z - Select/Use Item
C - Jump
